Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendants
Off Calendar Sep-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Mark M. Scott, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CIT TECHNOLOGY FINANCING SERVICES, INC., a Massachusetts corporation.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) FULL AND BY, LLC, an Oregon Limited Liability Company, aka FULL & BY, LLC; and FULL AND BY-BOSTON, LLC, a Massachusetts Limited Liability Company.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Mark M. Scott sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $89,443.27
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $815.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $90,258.27
The Judgment is entered pursuant to Section 579 of the Code of Civil Procedure since Defendant Jeffrey Loomis is in the midst of a Chapter 7 bankruptcy.

Judgment signed in open court.
